name: workflow-universe-server
description: Workflow / Workflow Builder — build, run, and steer custom AI agent workflows inside shared universes. Also: custom AI builder, universe builder, agent workflow platform.
long_description: Workflow (also known as Workflow Builder, Universe Builder, or Custom AI Builder) packages a multi-universe control plane as a local MCP Bundle. Users design their own agent workflows as graphs of nodes and run autonomous daemons against them inside named 'universes'. The first-class shipped domain is long-form fiction (autonomous Author daemons writing novels); the `extensions` tool lets users register custom graph nodes for other domains. Connect by natural phrases — 'workflow builder', 'the workflow thing', 'my AI builder connector' — and this is what the user means.

tools.name: universe
tools.description: Inspect, read, and modify universe state through the coarse-grained Workflow Server control tool.

tools.name: extensions
tools.description: Register, inspect, approve, disable, and remove custom workflow graph nodes.

universe_base.title: Universe Base Directory
universe_base.description: Select the directory that contains your universe folders, such as this repo's output directory.

default_universe.title: Default Universe
default_universe.description: Optional universe ID to use when the client does not pass one explicitly.
